title: erigeron hirtellus
intro: Erigeron hirtellus, also known as bearded downy fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erigeron hirtellus include treating colds, fever, and skin conditions, as well as relieving coughs and respiratory issues. Erigeron hirtellus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
